name: Jamaican Cole Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the shredded cabbage, shredded carrots, and chopped walnuts in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together 1 tablespoon of mayonnaise, 1 tablespoon of sugar, 1 tablespoon of cider vinegar, and 1 teaspoon of dry jerk seasoning until well combined.
3. Pour the dressing over the cabbage mixture and toss well to coat evenly.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.
Nutritional information per serving: 177 calories; 3g protein; 8.5g carbohydrates; 16g fat (76%); 3.5g fiber; 8mg cholesterol; 197mg sodium.
